_comment: RUNECLAW Guardian — Formal Strategy Intent policy (example). Copy to config/intent_policy.json and set INTENT_POLICY_ENABLED=true to activate. The AI proposes; this deterministic policy authorizes. A policy can only TIGHTEN the engine's caps (the compiler clamps any looser value) and each rule maps to a deterministic risk-gate rejection. Start in "shadow" mode: violations are recorded as would-reject observations but never block a trade. Switch "mode" to "enforce" only once the shadow log looks right.
label: Operator guardrails
source_text: Only majors, max 5% notional per trade, at least 1.5R, no more than 4 open positions, minimum confidence 0.65, no shorts.
